item.description: Explore Florida's rising home prices, insurance, and utility costs—data-driven insights for buyers, retirees, and investors.

item.title: True Cost of Living in Florida: Real Estate & Expenses
item.description: A data-driven breakdown of Florida's housing market, regional costs, insurance, taxes, and hidden expenses for homebuyers and investors.
